questions.question: Who among the following has been re-elected as the President of Ecuador in May 2025?
Which single‑window telecom regulator’s April 2025 consultation on satellite‑based spectrum assignment complements India’s 6G backhaul ambitions?
In May 2025, the central government extended the tenure of Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) director Praveen Sood for a period of __________.
Which of the following institutes launched Bharat Cancer Genome Atlas in February 2025?
As of April 2025, under which pension scheme do the players who won silver or bronze medal in Asian or Commonwealth Games get a pension of ₹12,000 per month?
questions.option_3: Panchayat Yuva Krida aur Khel Abhiyan
questions.option_4: Sports Fund for Pension to Meritorious Sportspersons

questions.question: According to the Inter-Services Organisations (Command, Control and Discipline) Act, 2023—effective from May 2025—unified command authority has been granted over personnel from which branches of the Indian Armed Forces?
Which of the following countries was elected as the President of the African-Asian Rural Development Organization for the Triennium 2025–2027 during its 21ˢᵗ General Session in February 2025?
Which Indian state hosted the International Millet Conference, 2025, to promote millet farming and trade?
On which theme did the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) organise a conference for large-sized Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs) in Chennai on 28 March 2025?
questions.option_1: NBFCs: The Rise of the Indian Economy
questions.option_2: Advancing the Digital Disruptions in NBFCs
questions.option_4: Shared Vision, Shared Responsibility: Strengthening the NBFCs

questions.question: Which Indian author won the Debut category at the KLF Book Awards in 2025 for 'The Many Lives of Syeda X'?
The Advocates (Amendment) Bill, 2025, proposed which significant change to the legal profession?
questions.option_1: Retirement age fixed at 60 for advocates
questions.option_2: Recognising in-house counsel and corporate lawyers as "legal practitioners"
questions.option_3: Dissolution of Bar Council of India structure
questions.option_4: Ban on entry of foreign law firms in India

questions.question: In which of the following states did the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) conduct the maiden flight-trials of the Stratospheric Airship Platform in May 2025?
In April 2025, which Indian opposition leader discussed concerns about democratic backsliding in a 2025 event at Brown University?
The World Happiness Report, 2025, ranked which of following countries as the happiest in the world for the seventh consecutive year?
The AI‑powered handheld X‑ray devices deployed in Uttar Pradesh for TB detection have been designed to interpret which rapid diagnostic assay?
Where was India’s first solar-powered airport terminal inaugurated in early 2025?
Where was INIOCHOS-25, the multinational air exercise hosted by the Hellenic Air Force, conducted?
Which ministry introduced the Drugs and Cosmetics (Compounding of Offences) Rules, 2025, to streamline minor offence resolution?
questions.option_1: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
questions.option_4: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution

questions.question: As in May 2025, who was the Secretary, Department of Atomic Energy (DAE) & Chairman, Atomic Energy Commission (AEC)?
In June 2025, Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Limited (GRSE) signed an MoU with Norway’s Kongsberg to build India’s first vessel in which category?
Who received the Football Writers' Association (FWA) Women's Footballer of the Year award for the 2024-25 season?
John Dramani Mahama has been sworn in as the President of which country in January 2025?
Who among the following launched the AIKosha in 2025?
questions.option_1: Union Minister for Health & Family Welfare
questions.option_3: Union Minister for Electronics & Information Technology

questions.question: The 18ᵗʰ Pravasi Bharatiya Divas Convention (PBD) 2025 was held in which month of 2025 in Bhubaneswar?
To align with modern industrial practices, which new order did the Central Government introduce in 2025 to replace the Sugar (Control) Order, 1966?
